name: Resume/CV
description: Clean, professional layout for resumes and CVs.

preview.sampleText: Professional, clean layout designed for career documents.

classes.h2: text-lg font-bold mb-3 text-blue-700 uppercase tracking-widest border-b-2 border-blue-600 pb-1
classes.h6: text-xs font-semibold mb-1 text-gray-500 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.blockquote: border-l-2 border-blue-500 pl-4 my-3 text-gray-600 text-sm italic
classes.code: bg-gray-100 px-1 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-xs text-gray-800
classes.pre: bg-gray-50 p-3 rounded overflow-x-auto text-sm border border-gray-200
